## For Plugin/Theme Submissions

- [ ] I have completed the [Plugin Submission Checklist](PLUGIN_CHECKLIST.md)
- [ ] I have tested the plugin/theme in isolation
- [ ] I have tested with other active plugins/themes
- [ ] Cleanup is properly registered (if applicable)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Code is documented and readable

## For Core API Changes

- [ ] API is documented in [docs/api/](docs/api/)
- [ ] Backward compatibility is maintained
- [ ] Examples are provided
- [ ] Changes follow the [Design Philosophy](README.md#design-philosophy)
